items.title: [正面] The mechanics are fun and fine if you like card bu...
items.summary: The mechanics are fun and fine if you like card builders (decks based on characters, cards themselves are not interchangeable) and turn based fighting like slay the spire. The best part of it so far though is the story. I am not a huge fan of horror( i hate horror) but this games over arching story and arcs themselves are SO GOOD i wont say that if your looking for strange reactions or responses sometimes that you wont find them but to say you hate at least any of the first 4 chapters story then im sorry your just playing the game to not like it. What really made me fall in love with this game is the scene that plays after you take a long break. Thankyou so much Brain In A Vat. that scene was beautiful and so in character for this dark and twisted world you have created. I plan to make this my gacha game for as long as you are willing to keep the game alive.

items.title: [正面] Im just starting and im completely in love with th...
items.summary:
Im just starting and im completely in love with this game. 
Art style is peak.
Music is peak.
Story is depressing and nihilistic = peak.
its a gacha game that doesnt feel like its predatory and its gifting you so much stuff to pull characters, its unreal. 
10/10 <3

items.title: [负面] Los gráficos son uno de los puntos fuertes del jue...
items.summary: Los gráficos son uno de los puntos fuertes del juego. Sin embargo, la historia y la jugabilidad dejan bastante que desear. Apenas unos minutos después de empezar, el juego te introduce en combate sin explicar adecuadamente las mecánicas básicas, lo que puede resultar confuso para jugadores nuevos. Además, la narrativa del prólogo y del acto 1 no logra captar mi interés, por lo que la experiencia inicial termina siendo poco atractiva.

items.title: [正面] Very good game. One of the only gacha which I wann...
items.summary: Very good game. One of the only gacha which I wanna continue playing. Great storytelling, great gameplay which requires thinking and calculations. Hope the game gets better and better, and gets more player. The number of players now is definitely not what this game deserves. Fighting.

items.title:
[正面] 最近游戏荒了，在搜克苏鲁相关和肉鸽like相关的时候找到了这个游戏
虽然是款抽卡游戏，目前体验下来剧...
items.summary:
最近游戏荒了，在搜克苏鲁相关和肉鸽like相关的时候找到了这个游戏
虽然是款抽卡游戏，目前体验下来剧情个人感觉写的不错，看到了PVP内容但是还没有体验，目前个人感觉是不怎么氪不怎么肝的，送的石头到现在都没抽完，比大部分二游良心太多了。
目前才到第四章，感觉体力目前不是很够用了
美术很棒，音乐很棒，剧情也不错
当做日常消遣来说不错的
